welcome: EXCELLENCE WITH L’APPART HOTEL LA TERAL
description_1: L’APPART HOTEL LA TERAL offers an exclusive collection of high-standing apartments, combining the independence of a private residence with the refinement of the most prestigious hotel services.
description_2: L’APPART HOTEL LA TERAL offers you a unique experience, enhanced by a spectacular panoramic view between sea and mountains. Ideally located, the residence benefits from immediate proximity to the famous Malabata Beach and Villa Harris Park, while being just steps away from the city's best restaurants and shopping centers. Whether your stay is dedicated to business or a family vacation, enjoy an exceptional setting designed for excellence and absolute serenity.
